# Balancing equations by adding or subtracting

## Short Teaching Summary
Adding or subtracting the same amount from both sides of an equation keeps the sides equal.

## Difficulty
0.00

## Prerequisites
- Equation balance metaphor

## Related Concepts
- Equation balance metaphor (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- We can perform adding or subtracting the same amount from each side of an equation.

## Best Analogy
- None recorded.
